top_signals.title: Trump’s White House Takes Aim at EU Emissions Law
top_signals.summary: With the US warning it could ship its energy elsewhere, some countries in Europe are urging the bloc to revisit the rules.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Director of ‘47 Ronin’ who gambled Netflix funds on crypto gets 30 months
top_signals.summary: Carl Rinsch will serve two and a half years in prison for taking money meant for a Netflix show to buy Dogecoin, stocks and luxury goods.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Are we invulnerable or just plain lucky?
top_signals.summary: The fragility of the world’s economic resilience
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Nord Gas to Supply LNG Regasification System for Exmar FSRU Conversion
top_signals.summary: Nord Gas Solutions has secured a contract to supply an LNG regasification system for Belgium-based Exmar as part of the conversion of a floating storage regasification unit (FSRU) that will support the expansion of the EemsEnergyTerminal in Eemshaven…
